## What does this change?

<!-- New skill, fix to an existing skill, or infra change. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Every API, class, command, and flag is verified against the current ABP
      source or official docs (no invented signatures).
- [ ] Code examples are syntactically valid and use current (non-obsolete) APIs.
- [ ] New/changed skills have front matter with `name`, `description`, `license`.
- [ ] If a plugin was added, all four marketplace manifests and both
      `plugin.json` files are updated and consistent.
- [ ] `python3 eng/validate.py` passes locally.
